caps.proposition_text: The clinician assesses hepatitis C.

evidence.span_text: Hepatitis C.

caps.proposition_text: The patient has a history of intravenous drug use.

evidence.span_text: HISTORY OF PRESENT ILLNESS

caps.proposition_text: The patient reports history of heavy alcohol use.

evidence.span_text: Bruce Ward is a pleasant 60-year-old male who presents to the clinic today following a positive result in a hepatitis C antibody test. He was sent to obtain the hepatitis C antibody test as part of a routine physical. He states he is anxious with the results and denies he has ever been diagnosed with hepatitis C. The patient admits to intravenous drug use in the past; however, he notes it has been longer than 15 years since his last usage. He also reports a history of heavy alcohol use. He continues to drink a beer on occasion. The patient currently smokes 1 to 2 cigarettes per day. He notes he used to smoke more and is having difficulty with complete cessation.

caps.proposition_text: The patient is having difficulty with complete cessation.

He was sent to obtain the hepatitis C antibody test as part of a routine physical. He states he is anxious with the results and denies he has ever been diagnosed with hepatitis C. The patient admits to intravenous drug use in the past; however, he notes it has been longer than 15 years since his last usage. He also reports a history of heavy alcohol use. He continues to drink a beer on occasion. The patient currently smokes 1 to 2 cigarettes per day. He notes he used to smoke more and is having difficulty with complete cessation.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician recommends checking hepatitis C RNA.

evidence.span_text: Hepatitis C.

caps.proposition_text: The HCV antibody test is positive.

evidence.span_text: The HCV antibody test was reviewed today and is positive.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician recommends additional blood work.

evidence.span_text: After reviewing the patient's laboratory findings today, I have had a lengthy discussion with him in regard to his current symptoms. His initial labs were consistent with a hepatitis C diagnosis. I have recommended that we confirm the diagnosis with additional blood work including checking his hepatitis C RNA and HCV genotype. I have also recommended that we obtain an ultrasound elastography to evaluate for fibrosis of the liver.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician recommends checking HCV genotype.
